title: Tokusatsu Hero

imagePrompts.prompt: {"type":"Japanese tokusatsu hero design reference sheet","style":"high-end industrial concept art, premium sci-fi character dossier, clean white studio presentation board, realistic CG rendering with sharp mechanical detailing and glossy metallic surfaces","subject":{"franchise":"original fictional tokusatsu hero","character name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","theme":"armored insect-inspired motorcycle hero based on a rhinoceros beetle motif","color scheme":{"primary":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"deep metallic crimson\"}","secondary":"black carbon fiber bodysuit","accent":"cyan glowing lines and lenses","metal":"gunmetal and silver"},"hero design":{"helmet":"sleek armored helmet with a long upward-curving rhinoceros beetle horn, segmented faceplate, bright cyan compound-eye visor, aggressive mechanical jaw area","body armor":"heavy layered chest, shoulder, forearm, thigh, shin, and knee armor with angular paneling, scratches, vents, and glowing cyan seams","undersuit":"matte black textured tactical suit between armor plates","belt":"large transformation belt with circular glowing core device at the center"},"vehicle":{"type":"futuristic superbike","design":"matching crimson armored motorcycle with beetle-horn front fairing, cyan headlights, black mechanical frame, gold front forks, aerodynamic side panels, and aggressive racing silhouette"},"weapon":{"name":"horn blade gun","design":"hybrid blade-and-rifle weapon using the beetle horn motif, rendered in two modes with red armor shell, black grip, metallic mechanical internals, and circular core near the rear"}},"layout":{"orientation":"portrait","page":"single reference/specification sheet with thin gray dividers and black section headers","sections":[{"title":"全身前面","position":"left column upper","count":1,"labels":["full front body"]},{"title":"三面図","position":"upper middle","count":2,"labels":["back view","side view"]},{"title":"変身ベルト","position":"upper right","count":1,"labels":["belt close-up"]},{"title":"変身アイテム","position":"right upper-middle","count":1,"labels":["カブコア"]},{"title":"変身工程","position":"right middle","count":3,"labels":["① ロック展開","② カブコアを装填","③ コア回転・ロック"]},{"title":"ライディングポーズ","position":"middle left and bottom right","count":2,"labels":["rider on motorcycle","rider on motorcycle"]},{"title":"ホーンブレイザー 剣モード","position":"right middle-lower","count":1,"labels":["sword mode"]},{"title":"ホーンブレイザー 銃モード","position":"right lower-middle","count":1,"labels":["gun mode"]},{"title":"weapon transformation steps","position":"beneath gun mode","count":4,"labels":["① ブレード部格納","② グリップ回転","③ 銃身スライド展開","④ ストック展開・ロック"]},{"title":"motorcycle main render","position":"bottom left large","count":1,"labels":["bike side-front view"]},{"title":"motorcycle detail callouts","position":"left of bike render","count":3,"labels":["ホーンカウル","エネルギーライン","武装マウント"]}],"top header":{"main title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","spec count":5,"spec labels":["身長","体重","パンチ力","キック力","ジャンプ力・ひと跳び","走力"]},"bottom spec bar":{"count":7,"labels":["全長","全幅","全高","車両重量","最高速度","主な機能","bike specs"]}},"text treatment":"all visible typography in Japanese, bold dark red main title, compact black labels in rectangular header tabs, fine gray annotation text, technical brochure aesthetic","composition":"densely packed but orderly reference sheet, large hero figure dominating the left side, technical components and weapon modes stacked on the right, large motorcycle render anchoring the bottom, realistic lighting on a white background","quality":"ultra-detailed, photorealistic CGI, polished concept sheet, magazine-grade mecha presentation"}

imagePrompts.title: Tokusatsu Hero Reference Sheet

prompt: {"type":"Japanese tokusatsu hero design reference sheet","style":"high-end industrial concept art, premium sci-fi character dossier, clean white studio presentation board, realistic CG rendering with sharp mechanical detailing and glossy metallic surfaces","subject":{"franchise":"original fictional tokusatsu hero","character name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","theme":"armored insect-inspired motorcycle hero based on a rhinoceros beetle motif","color scheme":{"primary":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"deep metallic crimson\"}","secondary":"black carbon fiber bodysuit","accent":"cyan glowing lines and lenses","metal":"gunmetal and silver"},"hero design":{"helmet":"sleek armored helmet with a long upward-curving rhinoceros beetle horn, segmented faceplate, bright cyan compound-eye visor, aggressive mechanical jaw area","body armor":"heavy layered chest, shoulder, forearm, thigh, shin, and knee armor with angular paneling, scratches, vents, and glowing cyan seams","undersuit":"matte black textured tactical suit between armor plates","belt":"large transformation belt with circular glowing core device at the center"},"vehicle":{"type":"futuristic superbike","design":"matching crimson armored motorcycle with beetle-horn front fairing, cyan headlights, black mechanical frame, gold front forks, aerodynamic side panels, and aggressive racing silhouette"},"weapon":{"name":"horn blade gun","design":"hybrid blade-and-rifle weapon using the beetle horn motif, rendered in two modes with red armor shell, black grip, metallic mechanical internals, and circular core near the rear"}},"layout":{"orientation":"portrait","page":"single reference/specification sheet with thin gray dividers and black section headers","sections":[{"title":"全身前面","position":"left column upper","count":1,"labels":["full front body"]},{"title":"三面図","position":"upper middle","count":2,"labels":["back view","side view"]},{"title":"変身ベルト","position":"upper right","count":1,"labels":["belt close-up"]},{"title":"変身アイテム","position":"right upper-middle","count":1,"labels":["カブコア"]},{"title":"変身工程","position":"right middle","count":3,"labels":["① ロック展開","② カブコアを装填","③ コア回転・ロック"]},{"title":"ライディングポーズ","position":"middle left and bottom right","count":2,"labels":["rider on motorcycle","rider on motorcycle"]},{"title":"ホーンブレイザー 剣モード","position":"right middle-lower","count":1,"labels":["sword mode"]},{"title":"ホーンブレイザー 銃モード","position":"right lower-middle","count":1,"labels":["gun mode"]},{"title":"weapon transformation steps","position":"beneath gun mode","count":4,"labels":["① ブレード部格納","② グリップ回転","③ 銃身スライド展開","④ ストック展開・ロック"]},{"title":"motorcycle main render","position":"bottom left large","count":1,"labels":["bike side-front view"]},{"title":"motorcycle detail callouts","position":"left of bike render","count":3,"labels":["ホーンカウル","エネルギーライン","武装マウント"]}],"top header":{"main title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","spec count":5,"spec labels":["身長","体重","パンチ力","キック力","ジャンプ力・ひと跳び","走力"]},"bottom spec bar":{"count":7,"labels":["全長","全幅","全高","車両重量","最高速度","主な機能","bike specs"]}},"text treatment":"all visible typography in Japanese, bold dark red main title, compact black labels in rectangular header tabs, fine gray annotation text, technical brochure aesthetic","composition":"densely packed but orderly reference sheet, large hero figure dominating the left side, technical components and weapon modes stacked on the right, large motorcycle render anchoring the bottom, realistic lighting on a white background","quality":"ultra-detailed, photorealistic CGI, polished concept sheet, magazine-grade mecha presentation"}

promptTranslations.zh: {"type":"日式特摄英雄设计参考表","style":"高端工业概念艺术，顶级科幻角色档案，干净白色工作室展示板，写实CG渲染，机甲细节锐利，金属表面光泽感强","subject":{"franchise":"原创虚构特摄英雄","character name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","theme":"基于独角仙造型的装甲昆虫摩托英雄","color scheme":{"primary":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"deep metallic crimson\"}","secondary":"黑色碳纤维连体服","accent":"青色发光线条与透镜","metal":"枪色金属与银色"},"hero design":{"helmet":"流线型装甲头盔，带长且向上弯曲的独角仙角，分段面罩，明亮青色复眼护目镜，具有攻击性的机械下颚区","body armor":"厚重分层胸甲、肩甲、前臂、股甲、小腿和膝盖装甲，带有棱角分片、刮痕、通风孔和发光青色接缝","undersuit":"装甲间的哑光黑色战术服","belt":"大型变身腰带，中央有圆形发光核心装置"},"vehicle":{"type":"未来摩托车","design":"匹配红色装甲摩托，前部车壳带独角仙角造型，青色大灯，黑色机械车架，金色前叉，空气动力侧板，极具攻击性的赛车轮廓"},"weapon":{"name":"角刃枪","design":"独角仙角造型的混合刀刃与步枪武器，双模式切换，红色装甲外壳，黑色握把，机械金属内构，后部带圆形核心"}},"layout":{"orientation":"portrait","page":"单页参考/规格表，细灰色分割线与黑色标题","sections":[{"title":"正面全身","position":"左栏上方","count":1,"labels":["全身正面视图"]},{"title":"三视图","position":"中上方","count":2,"labels":["背面视图","侧面视图"]},{"title":"变身腰带","position":"右上方","count":1,"labels":["腰带特写"]},{"title":"变身道具","position":"右上中","count":1,"labels":["カブコア（独角核）"]},{"title":"变身步骤","position":"右中部","count":3,"labels":["① 锁机展开","② 装填独角核","③ 核心旋转锁定"]},{"title":"骑行姿势","position":"左中及右下","count":2,"labels":["骑手骑摩托","骑手骑摩托"]},{"title":"角刃枪 剑模式","position":"右中下","count":1,"labels":["剑模式"]},{"title":"角刃枪 枪模式","position":"右下中","count":1,"labels":["枪模式"]},{"title":"武器变形步骤","position":"枪模式下方","count":4,"labels":["① 刀刃部收纳","② 握把旋转","③ 枪管滑动展开","④ 枪托展开锁定"]},{"title":"摩托车主渲染","position":"左下大图","count":1,"labels":["摩托车侧前视图"]},{"title":"摩托车细节标注","position":"摩托渲染左侧","count":3,"labels":["角罩","能量线","武装挂载"]}],"top header":{"main title":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","spec count":5,"spec labels":["身高","体重","拳力","腿力","跳跃力・单跳距离","奔跑力"]},"bottom spec bar":{"count":7,"labels":["全长","全宽","全高","车辆重量","最高速度","主要功能","摩托车规格"]}},"text promptTranslations.fr: {"type":"Fiche de référence de design de héros tokusatsu japonais","style":"concept art industriel haut de gamme, dossier de personnage de science-fiction premium, panneau de présentation de studio blanc propre, rendu CG réaliste avec détails mécaniques nets et surfaces métalliques brillantes","subject":{"franchise":"héros tokusatsu fictif original","character name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","theme":"héros motard en armure inspiré par les insectes, basé sur un motif de scarabée rhinocéros","color scheme":{"primary":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"rouge cramoisi métallique profond\"}","secondary":"combinaison en fibre de carbone noire","accent":"lignes et lentilles lumineuses cyan","metal":"acier et argent"},"hero design":{"helmet":"casque blindé élégant avec une longue corne de scarabée rhinocéros incurvée vers le haut, plaque faciale segmentée, visière à facettes cyan brillant, zone de mâchoire mécanique agressive","body armor":"armure lourde superposée sur la poitrine, les épaules, les avant-bras, les cuisses, les tibias et les genoux avec des panneaux angulaires, des rayures, des évents et des coutures cyan lumineuses","undersuit":"combinaison tactique texturée noir mat entre les plaques d'armure","belt":"grande ceinture de transformation avec un dispositif à cœur lumineux circulaire au centre"},"vehicle":{"type":"superbike futuriste","design":"moto blindée cramoisie assortie avec carénage avant en forme de corne de scarabée, phares cyan, cadre mécanique noir, fourches avant dorées, panneaux latéraux aérodynamiques et silhouette de course agressive"},"weapon":{"name":"pistolet-lame à corne","design":"arme hybride lame-fusil utilisant le motif de la corne de scarabée, rendue en deux modes avec coque d'armure rouge, poignée noire, composants mécaniques internes métalliques et cœur circulaire près de l'arrière"}},"layout":{"orientation":"portrait","page":"fiche de référence/spécification unique avec de fines séparations grises et des en-têtes de section promptTranslations.ru: {"type":"лист с концепт-артом героя в японском стиле токусацу","style":"высококачественный промышленный концепт-арт, премиальное досье персонажа в стиле научной фантастики, линзы","metal":"оружейная сталь и серебро"},"hero design":{"helmet":"обтекаемый бронированный шлем с длинным загнутым вверх рогом жука-носорога, сегментированная лицевая панель, ярко-голубой фасеточный визор, агрессивная механическая челюстная зона","body armor":"тяжелая многослойная броня на груди, плечах, предплечьях, бедрах и голенях с угловатыми панелями, царапинами, вентиляционными золотыми передними вилками, аэродинамическими боковыми панелями и агрессивным гоночным силуэтом"},"weapon":{"name":"horn blade gun","design":"гибридное оружие (клинок и винтовка) с мотивом рога жука, promptTranslations.pt: {"type":"folha de referência de design de herói tokusatsu japonês","style":"arte conceitual industrial de alto nível, dossiê de personagem de ficção científica premium, quadro de apresentação de estúdio branco limpo, renderização CG realista com detalhes mecânicos nítidos e superfícies metálicas brilhantes","subject":{"franchise":"herói tokusatsu fictício original","character name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"重甲機士 カブライザー\"}","theme":"herói motociclista blindado inspirado em insetos baseado em um motivo de besouro rinoceronte","color scheme":{"primary":"{argument name=\"armor color\" default=\"carmesim metálico profundo\"}","secondary":"traje de fibra de carbono preto","accent":"linhas e lentes brilhantes em ciano","metal":"gunmetal e prata"},"hero design":{"helmet":"capacete blindado elegante com um longo chifre de besouro rinoceronte curvado para cima, placa facial segmentada, visor de olho composto ciano brilhante, área de mandíbula mecânica agressiva","body armor":"peito, ombros, antebraços, coxas, canelas e joelheiras pesadas em camadas com painéis angulares, arranhões, aberturas e costuras ciano brilhantes","undersuit":"traje tático texturizado preto fosco entre as placas de armadura","belt":"cinto de transformação grande com dispositivo de núcleo brilhante circular no centro"},"vehicle":{"type":"supermoto futurista","design":"motocicleta blindada carmesim correspondente com carenagem frontal de chifre de besouro, faróis ciano, estrutura mecânica preta, garfos renderizada em dois modos com revestimento de armadura vermelha, empunhadura preta, componentes mecânicos internos metálicos e núcleo circular perto da parte traseira"}},"layout":{"orientation":"retrato","page":"folha única de referência/especificação com divisórias cinzas finas e cabeçalhos de seção pretos","sections":[{"title":"全身前面","position":"coluna
